column1: # This file shows the expected CSV format for the kbase_uploader.py script.
#   --acc-col    : Unique sample/accession ID used for deduplication (default: ena_run_acc)
#   --url-col    : Forward / primary FTP or HTTP URL                 (default: ftp_link_1)
#   --url-col-2  : Reverse / secondary URL for paired-end reads      (default: ftp_link_2)
#                  Leave empty or omit the column for single-end reads.

column2: city: Used for human-readable progress messages only.
